title: StateEvent
description: Unified state event schema for state transitions across all DeerFlow state systems.

state_event_id.description: UUID -- globally unique identifier for this state event

context_id.description: Associated ContextEnvelope.context_id if this state belongs to a scoped context.

source_system.description: System that owns this state: gateway, deerflow_runtime, m01, m04, rtcm, watchdog, upgrade_center, memory, ...

state_domain.description: The domain/namespace of this state. Used to disambiguate same_name IDs across systems.

subject_id.description: Identifier of the subject: run_id, thread_id, task_id, project_id, etc. NOTE: same subject_id may have different meanings across state_domains.

previous_state.description: State value before the transition. Null if this is an initial state (first observation).

new_state.description: State value after the transition. For terminal states, no further transitions expected.

state_category.description: Category of this state: terminal=cannot transition further; intermediate=normal working state; neutral=completed normally with no success/failure semantic; error=failed state; pending=waiting for external input.

transition_reason.description: Human-readable reason for this state transition.

actor_system.description: System that triggered this state transition (may differ from source_system which owns the state).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this state event was recorded.

related_truth_event_id.description: Associated TruthEvent.truth_event_id if this state transition was triggered by a truth event (e.g., sandbox_execution_result caused governance state update).

artifact_refs.description: References to artifacts related to this state: checkpoint paths, log files, queue files, etc.
